sourcesContent:
# The match seam: `=~` and regex-index writes bind the last-match `_`
# per function invocation — a body with its own match write declares
# its own `let _` even under an outer `_`; module scope keeps ONE `_`.
"m0" =~ /m(0)/
top = _[1]

grab = (s) ->
  s =~ /x(\w+)/
  _[1]

indexed = (v) -> v[/^([1-9]\d*)$/, 1]

reader = ->
  "ab" =~ /a(b)/
  read = -> _[1]
  read()

branchy = (s) ->
  r = if s =~ /q(\d)/ then _[1] else "none"
  r

sieve = (xs) ->
  hits = (x for x in xs when x =~ /a(\w)/)
  [hits.length, _[1]]

looped = (xs) ->
  for x in xs
    x =~ /v(\d)/
  _[1]

class Cap
  grab: (s) ->
    s =~ /c(\w)/
    _[1]

param = (_) ->
  "zz" =~ /z(z)/
  _[1]

after = ("a" =~ /(a)/) isnt null
_ = 5
